title: Complete switch from projectatomic to containers for repo

comments.body:
Tests aren't happy @rhatdan 

```
vendor/github.com/projectatomic/buildah/add.go:19:2: cannot find package "github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/chrootuser" in any of:
	/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/chrootuser (vendor tree)
	/usr/local/go/src/github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/chrootuser (from $GOROOT)
	/go/src/github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/chrootuser (from $GOPATH)
vendor/github.com/projectatomic/buildah/run.go:34:2: cannot find package "github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/secrets" in any of:
	/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/secrets (vendor tree)
	/usr/local/go/src/github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/secrets (from $GOROOT)
	/go/src/github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/secrets (from $GOPATH)
```

More projectatomic to containers tweaks needed?

> More projectatomic to containers tweaks needed?

@TomSweeneyRedHat Looks like we have to first change the references in buildah, and once that's vendored, we can make it work here.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 883aea5) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

:pushpin: Commit 0e1d191 has been approved by `mheon`
